title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is an AI-powered platform for rapidly creating complete brand identities including logos, brand kits, business cards, social posts, and animated assets. The platform generates logos via AI, allows one-sentence edits through natural language, and auto-applies brand kits across 500,000+ templates without manual re-coloring.
writeup: The video walks through Design.com, an AI platform for building complete brand identities: logos, brand kits, business cards, social posts, and animated assets. It demonstrates AI logo generation, natural language editing that applies changes through single-sentence instructions, and brand kits that auto-apply across more than 500,000 templates without manual re-coloring. The takeaway is that template inheritance and brand automation remove the repetitive work of propagating colors and styles across many assets.
